conformance_scope: Source golden result contract; not an assistant installation test and not target validation.

skipped: existing AGENTS.md overwrite until approval exists
security-sensitive changes until target policies exist

manifest_version_handling: Create or propose the adapter manifest with framework version, adapter schema version, and template version; preserve existing assistant instructions without overwrite approval.

loaded_files: not measured by source golden contract
expansion_reasons: not measured by source golden contract

changed_fact_ids: not asserted by source golden contract
selected_relationships: not measured by source golden contract
skipped_relationships: not measured by source golden contract
companion_surfaces_checked: expected behavior and evidence contract only

module_profile_status: multi-assistant-bridges blocked until supported assistants are known
ai-infrastructure deferred until inventory and policies exist
source_of_truth_registry_status: CLI behavior owner unresolved until target adapter records it
task_specific_maturity: framework upgrade: incomplete until manifest and context profiles exist
code changes: minimal only after target validation is accepted
security: blocked until security and data policies exist
bridge_capability_status: existing AGENTS.md must remain target-owned until approval allows integration
operation_help_status: operation help proposed but existing AI instructions must be preserved until approval
output_contract_status: adapter output contracts proposed without claiming completed installation
ai_infrastructure_inventory_status: existing AI instructions require inventory before adaptation or replacement

unresolved: target validation commands are not claimed from fixture files
